name: testing-patterns
description: Testing patterns: unit tests, integration tests, mocking, component testing, E2E with Playwright

entries.title: Vitest Setup for React/Next.js
entries.content: Vitest: fast, Vite-native test runner. Use @testing-library/react for component tests. jsdom environment. Setup file for global mocks. Coverage with v8 or istanbul.

entries.title: React Component Testing Patterns
entries.content: Test behavior, not implementation. Render component, interact via user events, assert on visible output. Use screen.getByRole/getByText. Test accessibility. Mock fetch/API calls.

entries.title: API Integration Testing
entries.content: Test API routes end-to-end with real HTTP requests. Use supertest or direct fetch against test server. Setup/teardown test database. Test happy paths, error cases, auth, validation.

entries.title: Mocking Strategies (vi.mock, vi.fn, MSW)
entries.content: vi.fn() for function mocks. vi.mock() for module mocks. vi.spyOn() to watch methods. MSW (Mock Service Worker) for HTTP mocking — intercepts at network level, works in browser and Node.

entries.title: E2E Testing with Playwright
entries.content: Playwright: cross-browser E2E testing. Navigate pages, fill forms, click buttons, assert content. Visual regression with screenshots. Run against dev server. Parallel execution.
